temporal_description: In a dimly lit, tight space, a young boy with curly blonde hair is seen from a high angle. He is wearing a light-colored, possibly grey, t-shirt. The camera is shaky, suggesting a handheld, chaotic perspective. The boy is crying and struggling, his face contorted in distress. He reaches out with his hands, trying to push against a large, dark figure that dominates the left side of the frame. The figure, wearing dark clothing, appears to be holding the boy. The background is dark and indistinct, with a light-colored, possibly wooden, surface on the right. The camera moves erratically, following the boy's frantic movements as he continues to cry and resist. A young boy's voice, high-pitched and filled with raw terror, cries out in a desperate, panicked tone. He repeatedly sobs, "No! I don't want to! I don't want to!" The words are choked with fear and distress, as if he is being restrained and is in extreme distress. The background is filled with the sounds of a struggle, including grunts and the rustling of fabric, creating a tense and alarming atmosphere. The scene is devoid of any background music, which makes the boy's terrified cries and the sounds of the struggle the central focus of the audio.
